label: ReAct-style reasoning and acting

node.label: ReAct-style reasoning and acting
node.definition: Reasoning traces and environment actions are interleaved so the model can update plans using observations from tools.
node.why_it_matters: The role of ReAct-style reasoning and acting is to connect Chain-of-thought & latent reasoning, Tool use & function calling to downstream capabilities including Observe–plan–act agent loops.
limitations: Search and self-evaluation can multiply cost while preserving confident errors when states, tools, or verifiers are weak. Its direct dependencies include Chain-of-thought & latent reasoning, Tool use & function calling.

dependencies.rationale: ReAct-style reasoning and acting uses Chain-of-thought & latent reasoning as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
ReAct-style reasoning and acting uses Tool use & function calling as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
ReAct-style reasoning and acting stores, selects, or obtains information through External databases, APIs & live tools.

sentence_units.text: Reasoning traces and environment actions are interleaved so the model can update plans using observations from tools.
The role of ReAct-style reasoning and acting is to connect Chain-of-thought & latent reasoning, Tool use & function calling to downstream capabilities including Observe–plan–act agent loops.

Search and self-evaluation can multiply cost while preserving confident errors when states, tools, or verifiers are weak. Its direct dependencies include Chain-of-thought & latent reasoning, Tool use & function calling.
